password_info_title: Your eAadhaar password will be of 7/8 characters in length.
password_info_desc1: If your name contains more than 3 letters, your eAadhaar password will be a combination of the first four letters of your name followed by the year of birth.
password_info_desc2: If your name contains only 3 letters, your eAadhaar password will be a combination of the first three letters of your name followed by the year of birth.
printing_wait: Your Aadhaar card is printing. Please wait...

pdf_failed: Failed to open PDF. Please check password.
name: Name
example1_text: If your name is <1>ANISH Y KUMAR</1> and your Year of Birth is <3>1989</3>, then your eAadhaar password will be <5>ANIS1989</5>
example2_text: If your name is <1>RIA</1> and your Year of Birth is <3>1989</3>, then your eAadhaar password will be <5>RIA1989</5>

vid_info_message: In case you have changed your mobile number or wish to change your registered Email, you are required to get it updated in your Aadhaar as soon as possible.
virtual_id_desc: To Lock/Unlock your Aadhaar, you must use your 16-digit Virtual ID (VID).
lock_aadhaar_desc: Once your VID has been generated, proceed to lock your Aadhaar with your VID.
unlock_aadhaar_desc: To unlock your Aadhaar, please return here and use your VID.
generate_vid_helper: If you don't have one, please
lock_helper_text: Once locked, authentication via your Aadhaar number is disabled.
unlock_helper_text: Unlocking will also restore your ability to use your Aadhaar number.
declaration_lock: I understand that after locking my Aadhaar, I will be able to perform authentication using only Virtual ID (VID) and not Aadhaar Number.

enterDetailsToCheckStatus: Enter your details and submit to check your Aadhaar status.
aadhaarUpdatedMessage: Your Aadhaar has been updated. While your Aadhaar is being printed and posted to you, please download eAadhaar from
uploadTitle: Upload documents in support of identity and address
whatToSubmitContent:
Ration card, Voter identity card, Government-issued identity card/certificate having address, and Indian Passport serve as proof of both identity and address.

PAN card, Driving license, Secondary or Senior School mark sheet serve as proof of identity only.

Electricity/water/gas bill (last 3 months), Bank passbook, rent/lease agreement serve as proof of address only.
howToSubmitContent: The documents can be submitted online on myAadhaar portal or by visiting any Aadhaar centre.
onlineHelp: Enter 14 digit ID starting with S13 or S22
grievanceSuccessMessage: Your grievance/feedback has been registered successfully. Please note your service request number (SRN) {{srn}} for further communication.
shareExperience: Please share your experience while filing your Grievance / Feedback by rating below

welcomeTitle: Welcome to Home page of Appointment Portal. Please select from below choices for booking appointment
centreDescription: This facility is for booking an appointment at an Aadhaar Seva Kendra for Aadhaar Enrolment and Update Services
manageDescription: Status of various requests originated by you in the recent past. You can check the detailed status by clicking on the downward arrow icon.
